case_title: GUANG YI HU VS. BLUE DOG & LONG, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GUANG YI HU IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY HSIN-JU CHANG COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT BLUE DOG & LONG, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN LONG, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE DOG & LONG, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, GUANG YI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLUE DOG & LONG, LLC THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
